---
name: Bug Report 🐛
about: Report a system glitch, broken calculation, or layout fault to help us patch it.
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug, maintenance
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug:**
A clear description of what the system error or layout glitch is.

**Steps to reproduce:**
1. Go to the active application layout.
2. Click on '...'
3. Input specific values '...'
4. Watch the runtime fail or layout break.

**Expected behavior:**
A clear description of what should actually happen (e.g., dynamic progress bars loading cleanly without overlapping text parameters).

**Screenshots/Context:**
Add any console error logs or layout screenshots here.
